<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Routing; interface RequestContextAwareInterface { /** * Sets the request context. */ public function setContext(RequestContext $context): void; /** * Gets the request context. */ public function getContext(): RequestContext; }
